attr.title: Jimmy and the Pulsating Mass
attr.desc: Jimmy and the Pulsating Mass is a JRPG inspired by Earthbound, Final Fantasy V, and Breath of Fire. Play as Jimmy, a soft-spoken boy with the ability to transform into the monsters he defeats, and explore a surreal dream world full of humor, heart, and darkness.
attr.inst: Copy all files from the 'Jimmy and the Pulsating Mass mkxp' folder (the mkxp version) into the gamedata folder. Required files: Game.rgss3a, Game.ini, my_win32_wrapper.rb, Audio/ folder, Fonts/ folder.
